description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a modern, boxy design and a flat roof. The front facade features large rectangular windows, a single entry door, and a prominent garage with a roll-up door attached to the right side. The brickwork is uniform and reddish-brown, giving the house a clean, urban appearance. The rear and side walls are mostly solid brick with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The interior layout is partially visible from above, showing partitioned rooms and white interior walls. The overall structure is robust and utilitarian, suitable for dense urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with large front windows, a flat roof, and an attached garage. The design is boxy and urban, with minimal exterior ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, the main entry door, and the attached garage with a roll-up door.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the solid brick wall and the full extent of the garage structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid brick wall and a single small window or door visible.
description_view_3: Left side view showing a continuous brick wall with no windows or doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush entry door with no porch or overhang, adjacent to large windows and a garage door
